001import java.util.HashMap;
002import java.util.Stack;
003
004/**
005 * Décrivez votre classe GameEngine ici.
006 *
007 * @author Raphaël Quillaud
008 * @version 2026.04.01
009 */
010public class GameEngine {
011    private Room aCurrentRoom;
012    private Stack<Room> aPreviousRooms;
013    private Parser aParser;
014    private HashMap<String, Room> aRooms;
015    private UserInterface aGui;
016
017    public GameEngine() {
018        this.aRooms = new HashMap<String, Room>();
019        this.aParser = new Parser();
020        this.aPreviousRooms = new Stack<Room>();
021        this.createRooms();
022    }
023
024    /**
025     * Creates all rooms of the village and connects them with exits.
026     * Also sets the starting room (Henriette's kitchen).
027     */
028    private void createRooms() {
029        // Rooms
030        Room vKitchen       = new Room("in Henriette's warm, cosy kitchen","Images/kitchen.jpg");
031        Room vLivingRoom    = new Room("in the living room, next to the Christmas tree","Images/livingRoom.jpg");
032        Room vGarden        = new Room("in the snowy front garden of the house","Images/garden.jpg");
033        Room vUnderTreeHouse = new Room("under the tree house, in the snow","Images/underTreeHouse.jpg");
034        Room vTreeHouse     = new Room("in the children's tree house","Images/treeHouse.jpg");
035        Room vFrontHouse    = new Room("in the street, right in front of Henriette's house", "Images/frontHouse.jpg");
036        Room vThereseHouse  = new Room("in Thérèse's house, the neighbour", "Images/thereseHouse.jpg");
037        Room vHouseStreet   = new Room("in the quiet street in front of the houses", "Images/houseStreet.jpg");
038        Room vBakery        = new Room("in the bakery that smells of fresh bread", "Images/bakery.jpg");
039        Room vMainStreet    = new Room("on the main street decorated with garlands", "Images/mainStreet.jpg");
040        Room vButcherShop   = new Room("in the butcher's shop, where a savoury smell of roasts fills the air", "Images/butcherShop.jpg");
041        Room vMainSquare    = new Room("on the village square, under the huge sparkling Christmas tree", "Images/mainSquare.jpg");
042        Room vGrocery       = new Room("in the small village grocery store", "Images/grocery.jpg");
043
044        // Store Rooms in the map
045        this.aRooms.put("kitchen", vKitchen);
046        this.aRooms.put("livingRoom", vLivingRoom);
047        this.aRooms.put("garden", vGarden);
048        this.aRooms.put("underTreeHouse", vUnderTreeHouse);
049        this.aRooms.put("treeHouse", vTreeHouse);
050        this.aRooms.put("frontHouse", vFrontHouse);
051        this.aRooms.put("thereseHouse", vThereseHouse);
052        this.aRooms.put("houseStreet", vHouseStreet);
053        this.aRooms.put("bakery", vBakery);
054        this.aRooms.put("mainStreet", vMainStreet);
055        this.aRooms.put("butcherShop", vButcherShop);
056        this.aRooms.put("mainSquare", vMainSquare);
057        this.aRooms.put("grocery", vGrocery);
058
059        // Exits
060        // Kitchen
061        vKitchen.setExit("east", vLivingRoom);
062
063        // Living room
064        vLivingRoom.setExit("east", vGarden);
065        vLivingRoom.setExit("west", vKitchen);
066
067        // Garden
068        vGarden.setExit("north", vUnderTreeHouse);
069        vGarden.setExit("east", vFrontHouse);
070        vGarden.setExit("west", vLivingRoom);
071
072        // Under Treehouse
073        vUnderTreeHouse.setExit("south", vGarden);
074        vUnderTreeHouse.setExit("up", vTreeHouse);
075
076        // Treehouse
077        vTreeHouse.setExit("down", vUnderTreeHouse);
078
079        // Front of the house
080        vFrontHouse.setExit("south", vHouseStreet);
081        vFrontHouse.setExit("west", vGarden);
082
083        // Therese's house
084        vThereseHouse.setExit("north", vGarden);
085        vThereseHouse.setExit("east", vHouseStreet);
086
087        // House street
088        vHouseStreet.setExit("north", vFrontHouse);
089        vHouseStreet.setExit("south", vMainStreet);
090        vHouseStreet.setExit("west", vThereseHouse);
091
092        // Bakery
093        vBakery.setExit("east", vMainStreet);
094
095        // Main street
096        vMainStreet.setExit("north", vHouseStreet);
097        vMainStreet.setExit("east", vButcherShop);
098        vMainStreet.setExit("south", vMainSquare);
099        vMainStreet.setExit("west", vBakery);
100
101        // Butcher's shop
102        vButcherShop.setExit("west", vMainStreet);
103
104        // Main square
105        vMainSquare.setExit("north", vMainStreet);
106        vMainSquare.setExit("east", vGrocery);
107
108        // Grocery
109        vGrocery.setExit("west", vMainSquare);
110
111        // Items
112        Item vRecipeBook = new Item("recipeBook", "Henriette's Christmas recipe book", 1);
113        Item vFlour = new Item("flour","a bag of flour", 1);
114        Item vButter = new Item("butter","a block of butter", 1);
115        Item vSugar = new Item("sugar", "a packet of sugar", 1);
116        Item vChocolate = new Item("chocolate", "a bar of dark chocolate", 1);
117        Item vTurkey = new Item("turkey","a beautiful Christmas turkey", 5);
118        Item vSpices = new Item("spices","a small box of Christmas spices", 1);
119        Item vWoodLog = new Item("log","a dry log for the fireplace", 2);
120
121        // Place items in rooms
122        vKitchen.addItem(vRecipeBook);
123        vBakery.addItem(vFlour);
124        vGrocery.addItem(vButter);
125        vButcherShop.addItem(vTurkey);
126        vThereseHouse.addItem(vSpices);
127        vUnderTreeHouse.addItem(vWoodLog);
128        vBakery.addItem(vSugar);
129        vBakery.addItem(vChocolate);
130
131        this.aCurrentRoom = vKitchen;
132    }
133
134    /**
135     * Tries to go to the room in the direction given by the command.
136     * If there is no second word or no exit in that direction,
137     * prints an error message.
138     *
139     * @param pCommand the command containing the direction
140     */
141    private void goRoom(final Command pCommand) {
142        if (!pCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
143            this.aGui.println("Go where ?");
144            return;
145        }
146
147        String vDirection = pCommand.getSecondWord();
148        Room vNextRoom = this.aCurrentRoom.getExit(vDirection);
149
150        if (vNextRoom == null) {
151            this.aGui.println("There is no door !");
152            return;
153        }
154
155        this.aPreviousRooms.push(this.aCurrentRoom);
156        this.aCurrentRoom = vNextRoom;
157        printLocationInfo();
158    }
159
160    /**
161     * Prints a detailed description of the current room,
162     * including its exits.
163     */
164    private void look() {
165        this.aGui.println(this.aCurrentRoom.getLongDescription());
166    }
167
168    /**
169     * Permet au joueur de "manger".
170     * Cette commande affiche simplement un message indiquant que le joueur a
171     * mangé et n'a plus faim. Pour l'instant, elle n'a aucun effet sur l'état
172     * interne du jeu (pas de gestion réelle de la faim).
173     */
174    private void eat() {
175        this.aGui.println("You have eaten now and you are not hungry any more.");
176    }
177
178    private void back() {
179        if (this.aPreviousRooms.empty()) {
180            this.aGui.println("You can't go back !");
181            return;
182        }
183
184        this.aCurrentRoom = this.aPreviousRooms.pop();
185        printLocationInfo();
186    }
187
188    /**
189     * Prints the welcome text and the initial location information.
190     */
191    private void printWelcome() {
192        this.aGui.println("""
193                
194                
195                *****************************
196                Welcome to "Henriette's Feast" !
197                It is Christmas Eve in a small, snowy village.
198                Grandma Henriette must prepare the big Christmas dinner
199                for the whole family, but she suddenly realizes she forgot
200                to do all the Christmas shopping.
201                
202                Explore the village, gather everything she needs
203                for the dinner, and come back to the kitchen in time !
204                
205                Type 'help' if you need help.
206                """);
207
208        printLocationInfo();
209    }
210
211    /**
212     * Prints the current room description and its available exits.
213     */
214    private void printLocationInfo() {
215        this.aGui.println("\n" + this.aCurrentRoom.getLongDescription() + "\n");
216
217        if (this.aCurrentRoom.getImageName() != null) {
218            this.aGui.showImage(this.aCurrentRoom.getImageName());
219        }
220    }
221
222    /**
223     * Prints a help message describing the game objective
224     * and the available commands.
225     */
226    private void printHelp() {
227        this.aGui.println("""
228                You are Grandma Henriette in a small snowy village.
229                You must find everything you need for the Christmas dinner.
230                
231                Your command words are:""");
232        this.aGui.println(this.aParser.getCommandList());
233    }
234
235    /**
236     * Interprets and executes the given command line.
237     *
238     * @param pCommandLine the command line entered by the user
239     */
240    public void interpretCommand(final String pCommandLine) {
241        this.aGui.println("> " + pCommandLine);
242        Command vCommand = this.aParser.getCommand(pCommandLine);
243
244        if (vCommand.isUnknown()) {
245            this.aGui.println("I don't know what you mean...");
246            return;
247        }
248
249        String vCommandWord = vCommand.getCommandWord();
250
251        switch (vCommandWord) {
252            case "go" :
253                this.goRoom(vCommand);
254                break;
255
256            case "help" :
257                this.printHelp();
258                break;
259
260            case "look" :
261                if (vCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
262                    this.aGui.println("You can't look at something in particular.");
263                }
264                else {
265                    this.look();
266                }
267                break;
268
269            case "eat" :
270                if (vCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
271                    this.aGui.println("You can't eat something in particular.");
272                }
273                else {
274                    this.eat();
275                }
276                break;
277
278            case "quit" :
279                if (vCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
280                    this.aGui.println("Quit what ?");
281                }
282                else {
283                    this.endGame();
284                }
285                break;
286
287            case "back" :
288                if (vCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
289                    this.aGui.println("Back what ?");
290                }
291                else {
292                    this.back();
293                }
294                break;
295
296            default :
297                this.aGui.println("Programmer error: command not recognised!");
298                break;
299        }
300    }
301
302    /**
303     * Stores the graphical user interface and prints the welcome message.
304     *
305     * @param pUserInterface the graphical user interface of the game
306     */
307    public void setGUI(final UserInterface pUserInterface) {
308        this.aGui = pUserInterface;
309        this.printWelcome();
310    }
311
312    /**
313     * Ends the game by printing a goodbye message and disabling input.
314     */
315    private void endGame() {
316        this.aGui.println("Thank you for playing. Goodbye.");
317        this.aGui.enable(false);
318    }
319
320} // GameEngine
